# FilterRepresentation

Registry and dispatcher for bidirectional conversion between authoring representations and canonical FilterNode IR . Manages named representation providers with kind based routing through sync wiring the coordination hub that lets toggle groups , text DSL inputs , URL param codecs , and visual builders all speak the same FilterNode language without coupling to one another

## Commands

### registerKind
Register a representation kind provider so that parse and print 
 dispatches can route to it . Called by provider registration syncs 
 to declare that a handler exists for this kind ( toggle group , 
 text dsl , url params , visual builder , odata ) .

**Arguments:** `$0` **kind** (string)

### register
Register a named representation provider of a given kind . The name 
 identifies the provider and must be unique across all registered 
 representations .

**Arguments:** `$0` **name** (string), `$1` **kind** (string)

### parse
Forward direction : convert a representation string authored in the 
 given kind s format into a canonical FilterNode IR JSON string . 
 Dispatches to the appropriate kind provider through sync wiring .

**Arguments:** `$0` **repr** (string), `$1` **kind** (string)

### print
Reverse direction : convert a canonical FilterNode IR JSON string into 
 the authoring representation string for the given kind . The produced 
 repr can be fed back into parse to recover the original tree 
 ( GetPut round trip law ) .

**Arguments:** `$0` **tree** (string), `$1` **kind** (string)

### canPrint
Check whether the kind provider can faithfully represent the given 
 FilterNode tree without loss . Returns true when the round trip 
 parse ( print ( tree , kind ) , kind ) would recover the original tree ; false when the kind s format is not expressive enough .

**Arguments:** `$0` **tree** (string), `$1` **kind** (string)

### list
Return all registered representations as a JSON array , each entry 
 containing the representation s name and kind .
